title: Creamy Briny Russian Peas Borscht
description: A hearty, comforting soup featuring sugar snap peas and a rich, creamy broth. This recipe is perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the diced onions and cook until they are translucent and starting to caramelize, about 8 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.

Add the sugar snap peas, beef broth, diced carrots, and diced beets to the pot. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Return the pot to medium heat and add the heavy cream and Greek yogurt. Stir until the soup is heated through and the cream has melted into the broth.
Season the soup with red wine vinegar and chopped fresh dill.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with additional chopped fresh dill if desired.
